Usually I wait until the year passes before dipping too deeply into these offerings, but this year I have been impressed by:
Bad Bunny, [‘DeBÍ TiRAR MáS FOToS’](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=f30fe0401ed947964181172284fb11e4235bea9938a28a07e18157ede03da221&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91943&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=0c0527949052c951a1ae929580a463ae&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=561177465d5ad7b805eac590fbf5abc6).
Geese, [Getting Killed](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=9b55a5ceb5264c7718997a04c636360e9dc6dc22c2319d881df736805606359e&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91943&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=8f432ee5e5613a6ec1ef865d8c06e6a7&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=561177465d5ad7b805eac590fbf5abc6).
Rosalia, [Lux](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=9deeb63cca836a71132195ff89fa51969e569e46cd838788c2b3e518e92a495e&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91943&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=09b9487928339d26b36c5e6321576016&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=561177465d5ad7b805eac590fbf5abc6).
Oklou, [Choke Enough](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=c55d553981f69955d717b0ec2312e5b41a5b467ef3adde4a768d44ed1434485f&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91943&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=61d7ef9237edf9548484e2fab0bcbd94&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=561177465d5ad7b805eac590fbf5abc6).
Saya Gray, [Saya](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=93e32a03c0a8a160abf730486f87c6e2e542ca532b966c6fcde7f62ca6f59b87&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91943&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=efc7c234bfc7edc687bc2ae53cc0f48a&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=561177465d5ad7b805eac590fbf5abc6).
Fontaines D.C., [Romance](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=3a80b2eaf22d0cb6eb636dc74c3059a658e741af73915b3097c1af9fca1d5220&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91943&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=bbce67b6964df68285778b953f823edc&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=561177465d5ad7b805eac590fbf5abc6), late 2024.
Jeff Tweedy, [Twilight Override](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=13354c1ac080119817129496e14c55a4dd011ac19789efc3bc48908eee123ab6&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91943&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=e4416a4173129385c5c79ddb3f362103&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=561177465d5ad7b805eac590fbf5abc6).
Raye, assorted songs.
There will be more, that is my first cut at a list of interest.
